title: Tales from the Dune
description: Adds a small bunch of content to the desert
body:
### Additions :

1 new weapon - The Sandwarrior's Scimitar

4 new items - Dune Light, Essence of Dune, Dune Shards and Dune Souls

1 new enemy - The Sandwarrior
    
##     Guide :
- Dune Shards can be found in desert pyramids, while you're there, kill some Huks to obtain/Dune Souls.
- By combining the Dune Souls with Dune Shards you get an Essence of the Dune. Used to craft the Dune Light and repair the Scimitar
- Dune Light can be used in the Desert during night-time, but you might want to arm yourself before using it...
##     Crafting :
![Essence of the Dune crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dddc08a3a73e45f7b0ec05c2fcee6908c0b986a8.png)
    
![Dune Light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9d0217bda80df03d5e184cad782c1f4d1cc2c8.png)
##     Using the Scimitar :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Sand Warriors have a 33% chance to drop their weapon : The Scimitar.
When hitting someone with the Scimitar it will launch you and the entity in the air, great way to isolate your enemies.
Pressing RMB will launch you in the air depending on your view angle, restores after a successful hit or by standing on the ground.
Small tip : You can avoid fall damage by hitting someone at the last moment before you land on the ground.

</details>
